data.label: Library for Neighbor Discovery Protocol
data.description: 该包包含一个为 IPv6 邻居发现协议提供封装的库。它还提供了一个名为 ndptool 的工具，用于发送和接收 NDP 消息。

data.label: Library for Neighbor Discovery Protocol
data.description: This package contains a library which provides a wrapper for IPv6 Neighbor Discovery Protocol. It also provides a tool named ndptool for sending and receiving NDP messages.
